overview.description: The First Trust Dorsey Wright International Focus 5 ETF (IFV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an ETF-of-ETFs that tracks a momentum-driven, country/region rotation index of international equities. The index is equal-weighted. IFV was launched on Jul 22, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.
